events.title: Historic Rittenhouse Town

events.description: Historic Rittenhouse Town tour/event during Parks on Tap programming (July 22-26).

events.title: Make the World Better Concert: Pavement + Ratboys
events.venue: The Dell, 2400 Strawberry Mansion Drive, Philadelphia, PA
events.description: Make the World Better Concert, a do-good-for-Philly effort by former Eagle Connor Barwin. Pavement headlines with Ratboys on July 24, Kurt Vile and the Violators on July 25. Part of $25 million rehab effort for rec centers and parks for local youth.
